response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of polyglot software development experience including current Staff Engineer title at re:cinq with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which aligns with the AI-native environment requirement. However, the resume shows no clear evidence of deep Python expertise (a must-have) or large-scale distributed systems work matching the high-throughput requirement — the closest is the Dunnhumby/Sociomantic role using DLang. Strong craftsmanship and breadth, but technical stack fit for the specific must-haves is uncertain.
strengths: Current Staff role with hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generator experience
Prior high-throughput systems work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic handling millions of requests/sec
Strong software craftsmanship foundation: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, teaching/workshops
concerns: Python is not listed in skills or employment history — a must-have technical requirement
Primary distributed-systems experience is in DLang, not the required Python stack
No explicit evidence of on-call rotation, incident response, or stakeholder management at staff scale
